name: app-website-evaluator
description: Evaluate an app or website and produce a prioritized, evidence-backed report with a standardized scorecard: each dimension scored 0-100 with a letter grade and a weight-averaged overall (plus optional --json). Covers SEO and crawlability (robots.txt, sitemap, metadata, structured data), AI-readiness (llms.txt, semantic HTML, machine-readable data), social/sharing assets (Open Graph, Twitter cards, favicons, logo, tagline), security and standards best-practices, performance/load-time, and growth — which communities to join or submit to, and concrete PR/advertising wins — all tailored to the specific type of app/website and its community.
